name: CJC-1295 (without DAC)
subtitle: Short-Acting Growth Hormone Releasing Hormone Analog
overview: Synthetic growth hormone releasing hormone analog with short half-life enabling pulsatile GH secretion patterns resembling natural physiology. Unlike CJC-1295 with DAC, this version preserves natural GH pulsatility without continuous elevation.
mechanism: Binds GHRH receptors on somatotroph cells in the pituitary gland, stimulating cAMP production and physiological GH pulses. The brief 30-minute half-life allows pulsatile release versus prolonged elevation.
keyBenefits: 4x greater receptor affinity than native GHRH

items.name: Natural GH Pulse Restoration
items.description: Restores natural GH pulsatility patterns in aging individuals.

items.name: IGF-1 Enhancement
items.description: Elevates IGF-1 through enhanced GH secretion.

items.name: Pituitary Support
items.description: Supports pituitary axis without suppression of natural function.

items.name: Muscle Mass Preservation
items.description: Supports maintenance of lean muscle mass through GH elevation.

items.name: Bone Density Maintenance
items.description: Supports bone health through GH-mediated pathways.

items.name: Skin Elasticity
items.description: Improvements in skin quality through collagen synthesis.

items.name: Exercise Recovery
items.description: Enhanced recovery from training through GH elevation.

items.name: Sleep Quality
items.description: Improved sleep architecture with bedtime dosing.

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous injection is the only effective route. Best administered on empty stomach, 30+ minutes away from food.

steps: Clean vial tops with alcohol pad and allow to dry
Gently roll to mix—avoid vigorous shaking
Verify solution clarity; cloudiness indicates degradation

keyBenefits: Lower abdomen, outer thigh, or back of upper arm
Morning upon waking and evening before bed optimal

interactions.notes: Complementary GH release via different receptor pathways. Popular combination.
Potent combination maximizing GH through dual pathways.
Can combine but watch for excessive GH elevation.
Choose one variant based on desired release kinetics.
Both are GHRH analogs; combining offers no additional benefit.
Different mechanisms; continuous ghrelin versus pulsatile GHRH.

timeline.effects: Improved sleep quality; vivid dreams from enhanced REM
Enhanced workout recovery, reduced muscle soreness, better pumps
Noticeable skin improvements, minor body composition shifts
Significant lean gains, fat loss, improved joint comfort
Continued gradual improvements in composition and well-being

stopSigns: Persistent joint pain or carpal tunnel symptoms
Allergic reaction signs at injection sites
monitoring: Blood glucose if diabetic—GH affects insulin sensitivity
Joint pain or carpal tunnel (excess GH indicator)

good: Vendor provides certificates of analysis (>98% purity)
Proper cold-chain shipping with ice packs/refrigeration
Vacuum-sealed vials showing pressure seal integrity
warning: Verify expiration dates; lyophilized peptides stable ~2 years if stored properly

references.title: Pharmacokinetics of Modified GRF(1-29) in Healthy Adults
references.keyFindings: Human study with 100-200mcg single dose in 12 subjects showed rapid absorption with peak GH at 15-30 minutes; established half-life and optimal frequency.

references.title: Growth Hormone Pulsatility with Mod GRF 1-29
references.keyFindings: Human study with 100mcg 3x daily for 30 days in 24 subjects preserved natural GH pulsatility patterns with no pituitary desensitization.

references.title: Comparative Analysis: CJC-1295 vs Native GHRH
references.keyFindings: In vitro and human receptor binding assays showed 4x greater receptor affinity than native GHRH with enhanced enzymatic degradation resistance.

references.title: Long-term Safety Profile of Modified GRF Analogs
references.keyFindings: Animal model with 6 months daily administration showed no significant pituitary morphology or function changes supporting chronic safety.

quickStats.storage: Lyophilized: 2-8°C refrigerated; Reconstituted: 2-8°C refrigerated, use within 30 days
